Off Calendar Apr-18-2018 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-26-2018 Continued To Apr-16-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Milton Katz in Propria Persona.
Jennifer Berg in Propria Persona.

Mr. Katz stated that they only have a copy of the will. Ms. Berg stated that they only have a copy of the will with proof of subscribing witness, spoke of her Mother's medical condition and lack of capacity, and stated that she and her Sister had durable power of attorney over her Mother to handle her affairs. Ms. Berg also stated that her Mother only had three Children, that no one is objecting, and that if the petition is denied, the Court make a finding that her Mother died intestate. Mr. Katz stated that he could provide an additional declaration/information regarding the Decedent's capacity. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to April 16, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The matter will be taken under submission on that date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: B. Wan. Not reported.
